item.text:
**Assessing workspace versions**

I’m considering how to assess the current workspace reference against the latest release version and registry version. The workspace reference I have is b42e72a, and all versions are v1.0.0. I need to check for any uncommitted changes and see if the current workspace reference is equal to the release tag. It could be essential to inspect the git status and log, especially since there might not be a remote connection. I'll also look into the AGENTS.md file for any relevant information on roles and capabilities.
我先核对工作区说明和 Git 发布状态，再生成结论。

item.command: powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem -Force; Write-Host '---AGENTS---'; Get-Content -Raw AGENTS.md; Write-Host '---AGENTS-FILES---'; rg --files -g AGENTS.md; Write-Host '---GIT-STATUS---'; git status --short --branch; Write-Host '---HEAD---'; git rev-parse --short HEAD; Write-Host '---LOG---'; git log --oneline --decorate -n 8; Write-Host '---TAGS---'; git tag --list; Write-Host '---HEAD-TAGS---'; git tag --points-at HEAD; Write-Host '---SHOW-HEAD---'; git show --stat --summary --oneline HEAD"

powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem -Force; Write-Host '---AGENTS---'; Get-Content -Raw AGENTS.md; Write-Host '---AGENTS-FILES---'; rg --files -g AGENTS.md; Write-Host '---GIT-STATUS---'; git status --short --branch; Write-Host '---HEAD---'; git rev-parse --short HEAD; Write-Host '---LOG---'; git log --oneline --decorate -n 8; Write-Host '---TAGS---'; git tag --list; Write-Host '---HEAD-TAGS---'; git tag --points-at HEAD; Write-Host '---SHOW-HEAD---'; git show --stat --summary --oneline HEAD"

item.text: Git 状态已拿到；再看未提交内容和发布说明。

item.command: powershell.exe -Command "Write-Host '---FILES---'; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force -Filter AGENTS.md | ForEach-Object { "'$_.FullName }; Write-Host '"'---CHANGELOG---'; Get-Content -Raw CHANGELOG.md; Write-Host '---BASELINE-RELEASE-NOTE---'; Get-Content -Raw baseline-release-note.md; Write-Host '---UNTRACKED-DIFF-SUMMARY---'; git diff --no-index -- /dev/null CHANGELOG.md; Write-Host '---UNTRACKED-NOTE-DIFF---'; git diff --no-index -- /dev/null baseline-release-note.md"

item.text:
**Evaluating pre-release artifacts**

I'm considering the situation with intended pre-release artifacts and documents that aren't committed yet. It seems likely I should continue with training to commit or reconcile a version bump and validate everything. If I decide to discard pre-release materials, it suggests that there's nothing significant worth keeping. I wonder if this decision could impact the overall project and what the implications might be. Let's think through the possible outcomes!
证据够用了；我现在整理成最终发布评审 JSON。

{
  "target_version": "v1.0.0",
  "current_workspace_ref": "b42e72a",
  "change_summary": "当前工作区 HEAD 为 b42e72a，且该提交已打上并指向已发布版本标签 v1.0.0；输入中的 current_registry_version、latest_release_version、bound_release_version、released_versions 也均为 v1.0.0。工作区仅存在两个未跟踪文件 `CHANGELOG.md` 与 `baseline-release-note.md`，未形成新的已提交发布内容，因此当前预发布不适合直接确认发布。",
  "capability_delta": [
    "相对已发布的 v1.0.0，未发现新的已提交能力增量；当前 HEAD 就是已发布标签对应提交。",
    "工作区存在未跟踪的发布说明类文件，表明有预发布整理动作，但这些内容尚未纳入 Git 历史，不能视为正式发布产物。",
    "未跟踪的 `baseline-release-note.md` 提到“评审状态流转 / acceptance”，而 `AGENTS.md` 提到“训练中心 API / 版本校验”，能力描述存在未受控漂移。"
  ],
  "risk_list": [
    "目标版本 v1.0.0 已经发布，再次确认发布会产生重复发布或覆盖认知风险。",
    "存在未跟踪文件，说明预发布内容尚未固化到提交中，发布后实际产物可能与评审材料不一致。",
    "仓库历史仅见 1 个初始化提交，缺少可验证的增量提交记录，无法证明存在新的可发布改动。",
    "未发现测试、验收或训练中心 API 校验记录，当前发布依据主要来自文档和 Git 元数据，验证充分性不足。"
  ],
  "validation_evidence": [
    "`git rev-parse --short HEAD` 返回 `b42e72a`，与输入 `current_workspace_ref` 一致。",
    "`git tag --points-at HEAD` 返回 `v1.0.0`，说明当前提交已对应已发布版本标签。",
    "`git status --short --branch` 显示分支 `master` 下存在未跟踪文件 `CHANGELOG.md` 和 `baseline-release-note.md`。",
    "`git log --oneline --decorate -n 8` 仅显示 `b42e72a (HEAD -> master, tag: v1.0.0) init`，未见新提交。",
    "工作区文件清单仅见 `AGENTS.md`、`CHANGELOG.md`、`baseline-release-note.md`，未发现可支撑新增能力的实现或验证文件。",
    "输入上下文中的 `current_registry_version`、`latest_release_version`、`bound_release_version`、`released_versions` 全部为 `v1.0.0`。"
  ],
  "release_recommendation": "reject_continue_training",
  "next_action_suggestion": "先明确本次是否确有新增发布内容：若有，需将变更提交入库、补充验证证据、统一 `AGENTS.md` 与 release note 描述，并升级到新的版本号后重新发起评审；若无新增内容，则清理未跟踪文件并结束本次预发布。",
  "warnings": [
    "仓库中未发现除角色说明/发布说明外的实现文件，无法独立验证“训练中心 API”“版本校验”等能力是否真实落地。",
    "未提供测试结果、验收记录、CI 输出或外部发布单据，验证结论仅基于本地 Git 状态与文档内容。",
    "未跟踪文件尚未进入版本控制，其内容是否代表最终候选发布内容仍不确定。"
  ]
}
